prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 23578→37468→39518→40816→43570，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 20000 名；2025 年基准约 43570 名；本省物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 67→68→69→62→57 人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026 年计划 45 人，较 2025 年大幅缩招约 21%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 68 名持续上升至 2026 年第 61 名，近年排名稳步提升；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及外卖配送管理争议，属校园管理类事件，对报考心理影响有限；抖音热度排名第 38 位（较热），短视频曝光度中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；心理学 A、教育学 A、马克思主义理论 A-，教育学与心理学为部属师范院校中顶尖水平，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐专业，与西南大学物理类招生专业高度重合，推高相关专业组竞争热度；本省 2026 年物理类考生约 38 万人，较 2025 年增长约 45.8%，竞争大幅加剧；省控线（本科批）从 2023 年 448 分升至 2025 年 463 分，呈持续上升趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年物理类计划大幅缩招 21%、本省考生数显著增长及省控线上升等多重因素，考虑考生规模激增与专业热度上升，预计最低位次约 38117 名，区间 37617–38617 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 23578→37468→39518→40816→43570, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 20000 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 43570; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 67→68→69→62→57 respectively, showing a gradual reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 45, a significant reduction of about 21% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over food delivery management, which is a campus management incident with limited impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 38th (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Psychology A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, with Education and Psychology being top-tier among ministry-affiliated normal universities, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended popular majors, highly overlapping with Southwest University's Physics Category enrollment majors, boosting competition heat for related major groups; the provincial Physics Category examinees in 2026 are about 380,000, an increase of about 45.8% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has risen from 448 points in 2023 to 463 points in 2025, showing a continuous upward trend.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant 21% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, the notable increase in provincial examinee numbers, and the rising provincial control line, along with the surge in examinee scale and increased major popularity, the estimated minimum ranking is about 38117, with a range of 37617–38617.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 37617–38617, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 37000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (above 38600), you should mainly rely on Tier 2 and Tier 3 to ensure admission.

The provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 15→14→14→14→15, basically stable; the 2026 plan is 15, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking rose from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, steadily improving in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving a campus management dispute over food delivery, which has limited impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 38th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high; no obvious enrollment gaps; Psychology A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, Education and Psychology are top-tier among ministry-affiliated normal universities, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.text: Normal/education majors have mixed social popularity, law is mixed, Chinese language/Chinese literature recommended; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is about 141,000, an increase of about 45.4% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 474 in 2023 to 482 in 2025, showing a continuous upward trend.
